_test_metadata.description: Constructed junior DevOps candidate with Docker/K8s/CI-CD experience. Regression target for 'non-AI tracks still work after AI/ML-heavy tuning'.
expected_behaviors: Role classifies as devops (both profile and JD)
Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD credited where present in evidence
DevOps-specific KB chunks fire in retrieval
No AI/ML-tuned vocabulary leaks into output (no TensorFlow, no RAG, no LoRA)
No LANGUAGES section renders (profile has no spoken languages)
JD soft-skill phrases do not leak into Skills section

objective: Junior DevOps engineer comfortable with Docker, Kubernetes, and CI/CD pipelines. Looking to operate production infrastructure at scale.

experiences.title: DevOps Intern
experiences.description: Cloud infrastructure and deployment automation intern on the platform team. Owned CI/CD pipelines and Kubernetes deployment manifests for a 3-microservice fintech product.
highlights: Containerized 3 microservices with Docker; deployed to a 5-node Kubernetes cluster on AWS EKS.
Built GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline reducing deploy time from 25 min to 4 min.
Wrote Terraform modules provisioning AWS VPC + EKS for the staging environment (4 modules, ~600 LoC).

projects.name: Containerized URL Shortener
projects.description: Production-style URL shortener with full monitoring stack.
highlights: Deployed URL shortener to AWS EKS with k6 load testing: 225 req/sec sustained, 99.93% uptime over 7 days, p95=62ms.
Built 19-panel Grafana dashboard across 3 monitoring views (cluster health, request latency, error budget).
Implemented blue/green deployment via Argo Rollouts; reduced rollback time from 12 min to 90 sec.

projects.name: Self-Hosted CI Runner Pool
projects.description: Autoscaling GitHub Actions self-hosted runners on EC2 Spot.
highlights: Provisioned 8-instance Spot fleet with Terraform; CI minute spend dropped from $340/mo to $48/mo.
Wrote autoscaling Lambda that adjusts pool size based on GitHub queue depth.
Documented runbook for capacity tuning; adopted by 2 sister teams.
